pokemon:ceruledge.name: Ceruledge
pokemon:ceruledge.summary: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.
An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon’s evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

form:ceruledge.name: Ceruledge
form:ceruledge.summary: Ceruledge form with Fire / Ghost typing.
